name: Pro X Plus
description: Solar Lantern with a mobile charging capability.

taxonomy.sub_category: Pro X Plus Updated on January 19, 2024 · Created on October 3, 2018 Pro X Plus Solar Lantern with a mobile charging capability. Developed By Greenlight Planet Tested By Lighting Global Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description Sunking Pro X Plus is a solar lantern with a 3W polycrystalline silicon solar panel, an LED lamp and a solar charging capability. Target SDGs SDG 7: Affordable and Clean Energy SDG 3: Good Health and Well-Being Market Suggested Retail Price $50.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household Distributors / Implementing Organizations Partner distributors. Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include Nokero N233 and Sun King Pro SK-301 Solar Lantern . Regions Central Africa, East Africa, South Asia, Southern Africa, West Africa Manufacturing/Building Method Mass produced. Intellectural Property Type Trademark User Provision Model The product is distributed by partner organizations to retailers and stores. Distributions to Date Status Unknown Lamp type LED Number of light points 1 Total light output (lumens) Low: 31 lumens, high: 250 lumens Multiple brightness settings (yes/no) Yes Light duration on single charge (hr) Low: 49 hours, high: 3.7 hours Mobile charging (yes/no) Yes Power source Solar Panel Battery type Lithium Iron Phosphate Peak power rating (Wp) 3 Wp Battery capacity (kWh; mAh) 3200 mAh Battery nominal voltage (V) 3.3 V User replaceable battery (yes/no) Yes User replaceable light (yes/no) Unknown Design Specifications Solar panel: Polycrystalline silicon, 3W. Battery: LiFePO4, 3.3V rechargable battery with 3200 mAh. LED: CCT "Cool" (3000 - 5000K) ; CRI - 73 Technical Support Available from the manufacturer. Replacement Components Available from the manufacturer. Lifecycle Battery has a lifecycle of 5 Years. AC-DC Charger Safety 4. Battery Composition, Battery Protection, Battery Durability. 5. Physical Ingress Protection 6. Water Ingress Protection 7. Drop Test 8.
